name: HMS Caldy (T 359)
events: 1 Mar 1944 HrMs O 10 (Lt.Cdr. A. van Altena, RNN(R)) participated in A/S exercises off Stornoway with HMS Caldy (T/Lt. G.D. Cowley, RNVR) and HMS Flint Castle (T/Lt. N. Harrison, RNVR). (1)
2 Mar 1944 HrMs O 10 (Lt.Cdr. A. van Altena, RNN(R)) participated in A/S exercises off Stornoway with HMS Caldy (T/Lt. G.D. Cowley, RNVR). (1)
4 Mar 1944 HrMs O 10 (Lt.Cdr. A. van Altena, RNN(R)) participated in A/S exercises off Stornoway with HMS Caldy (T/Lt. G.D. Cowley, RNVR). (1)

6 Mar 1944 HrMs O 10 (Lt.Cdr. A. van Altena, RNN(R)) participated in A/S exercises off Stornoway with HMS Caldy (T/Lt. G.D. Cowley, RNVR), HMS Flint Castle (T/Lt. N. Harrison, RNVR) and HMS Crowlin (A/Skr.Lt. A. Smith, RNR). (1)
23 Nov 1944 HMS Satyr (Lt. T.S. Weston, DSO, DSC, RN) departed Sheerness for Portland. She was escorted by HMS Caldy (T/Lt. G.D. Cowley, RNVR). (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
